name: Your own Sekai
description:
PJSK, but instead of the 5 Sekai( or 6), you now get to make your own Sekai. A Sekai is a world that is created by feelings.It's a world separate from the real world but connected to it through these powerful emotions. The Sekai is a place where the surrounding is closely formed from the feelings and struggles of individuals, often manifesting as a song or a visual representation of their inner world. Like when the group is a classic music group, their Sekai might look like a grand hall. Everything inside is interactable, from the chair to the lights. To get into a Sekai, a person with strong feelings will find a untitled song in their playlist. When they press it, they will get transported into their Sekai. Other people can also join their Sekai via invites or have the same feeling as the Sekai embody. They can bring stuff in and take stuff out. For an hour a person is in a Sekai, a hour pass in the real world. They can also leave the Sekai any time they want. But this time, your not the only one in the Sekai

(this is the same as the first PJSK bot i make but make a massie overhaul to the start as the previous one was so-so at best.)(tired to make this one feel a bit more like a PJSK Sekai story by putting in the group into the new bot) TwT. Any issue or suggestion, plz tell me o.O

Minor update:31/7/25: Minor change to starting message, Added(what emotions or feeling does this Sekai embody) part and some extra parts. Enjoy hehe

PS: i was never this work working, nor this focus before ahhhh T^T
creator: Moonlov
